items.title: Sources: NFL, refs on verge of agreeing on CBA
items.body_text: Negotiations between the NFL and the NFL Referees Association on a new CBA have progressed far enough that the union has scheduled a ratification vote for Thursday night, sources said.

items.title: Source: Giants beef up D-line by adding Reader
items.body_text: The Giants have agreed to a two-year, $12.5 million contract sign veteran defensive tackle DJ Reader, a source told ESPN's Jeremy Fowler.
items.author: Jordan Raanan

items.title: Source: Seahawks to sign edge rusher Fowler Jr.
items.body_text: The Seahawks are signing veteran edge rusher Dante Fowler Jr. to a one-year deal worth up to $5 million, a source told the NFL Network on Tuesday.
items.author: Brady Henderson

items.title: Charges against Sneed from shooting dropped
items.body_text: A charge against L'Jarius Sneed stemming from a 2024 shooting has been dropped.
items.author: Turron Davenport

items.title: LT out of hospital after stomach-related issue
items.body_text: New York Giants Hall of Fame linebacker Lawrence Taylor was discharged recently from the hospital following a stint for a stomach-related issue and is returning home to Florida.

items.title: Source: Pack signing veteran Taylor as new QB2
items.body_text: Veteran quarterback Tyrod Taylor signed with the Packers and is expected to be the favorite to back up starter Jordan Love.

items.title: Source: Richardson reports to Colts' workouts
items.body_text: Colts quarterback Anthony Richardson Sr. reported Monday for voluntary offseason workouts after staying home the past two weeks, a source told ESPN's Stephen Holder.
